h1.visual_description: Large, all-caps, sans-serif font. Includes a chapter number label followed by the main title, separated from the rest of the content by a horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, all-caps, sans-serif font, used for author attribution below the chapter title.

h3.visual_description: Small, bold, all-caps, sans-serif font, used for primary section headings within the text.

visual_matchers.pattern: Indented block of text with slightly smaller font size and increased left/right margins compared to standard body paragraphs.
Blue, underlined text within body paragraphs.
Small-font text at the bottom of the page, prefixed by a numerical index.
Superscript numerical digits immediately following words or punctuation in the body text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnote-based citations with superscript markers in-text.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page footer located at the bottom right containing a running head (e.g., 'PRICE TRANSPARENCY') and the page number.
